zh.of Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, W: 英國威爾斯丹比爾利朗勒朋維
zh.lifeSummary: Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton是Madog Goch Ab Iorwerth的女兒，於1140年出生在英國威爾斯波斯。她與Owain ap Bleddyn在英國威爾斯可爾德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國威爾斯可爾德。

zh-hans.Of Llandegai, Caernarvonshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾利安德加
zh-hans.{Blddn ap Cnfn}: 意大利馬阿斯可利 派諾
zh-hans.of Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, W: 英国威尔斯丹比爾利朗勒朋維
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton是Madog Goch Ab Iorwerth的女儿，于1140年出生在英国威尔斯波斯。她与Owain ap Bleddyn在英国威尔斯可爾德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在英国威尔斯可爾德。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Madore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Eusebe, Fernand, Lucien, Normand, Adhemar, Adrien, Donat, Elzear, Francois, Gaetan, Gilles.
French Canadian: from a French shortened form of the Spanish personal name Amador, from Latin Amator (from amator ‘lover’), a Christian saint's name. Compare Mador .
In some cases possibly also Breton (Madoré): nickname meaning literally ‘good help’, from Old Breton mat ‘good’ and uuoret ‘help’.

nameMeanings.name: Goch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Pawel, Zuzanna, Zygmunt.
North German: habitational name from any of various minor places which get their names from an ancient Germanic element goch, gog ‘marsh, bog, fen’.
Polish: from a pet form of various personal names beginning with Go-, such as Gościsław.

variants.name: Gotch
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh coch, goch ‘red(-haired)’; see Gooch 3.

nameMeanings.name: Efa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of several Anglicized forms of the Gaelic name Eithne . In the case of Queen Victoria's granddaughter Princess Ena (Victoria Eugénie Julia Ena,  1887–1969 ) it had a different origin: it was a misreading by the minister who baptized her off a handwritten note of the originally intended name   Eva .  In England, the name is remembered principally as that of the fearsome  Ena Sharples  in the television soap opera Coronation Street.  See also  Ina .

variants.name: Eithne
meanings: Traditional name, apparently from eithne ‘kernel’, which was used as a term of praise in bardic poetry. St Eithne was a daughter of King Laoghaire and one of St Patrick's first converts.

en.lifeSummary: Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton was born in 1140, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom as the daughter of Madog Goch Ab Iorwerth. She married Owain ap Bleddyn in Clwyd, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in Clwyd, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton est née en 1140, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fille de Madog Goch Ab Iorwerth. Elle a épousé Owain ap Bleddyn à Clwyd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Clwyd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Efa verch Madog Goch of Suttonは1140年にイギリスウェールズポウイスでMadog Goch Ab Iorwerthの娘として生まれた。イギリスウェールズクルウイドでOwain ap Bleddynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスウェールズクルウイドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton(은)는 1140년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 Madog Goch Ab Iorwerth의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 영국 웨일스 클w이드에서 Owain ap Bleddyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 웨일스 클w이드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton родилась в 1140 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания. Её отца звали Madog Goch Ab Iorwerth. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Owain ap Bleddyn в местности клвид, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности клвид, Уэльс, Великобритания.
